markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review content strategy and November performance data.](https://fathom.video/share/xPjBmpzye8CgLBto_Yg-zu4GVZ4BxnLk?tab=summary&timestamp=150.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Strategic Repositioning:** Content will shift from an SDR-only focus to a full RevOps platform. This involves creating new clusters for Forecasting and Conversation Intelligence, while optimizing existing SDR content with a broader platform angle.](https://fathom.video/share/xPjBmpzye8CgLBto_Yg-zu4GVZ4BxnLk?tab=summary&timestamp=241.0)
  - [**November Performance:** Traffic dipped seasonally, but engagement rates remained very high (60–80%), indicating excellent content quality. LLM traffic hit a new annual high, with Gemini emerging as a key driver.](https://fathom.video/share/xPjBmpzye8CgLBto_Yg-zu4GVZ4BxnLk?tab=summary&timestamp=1375.0)
  - [**Data Integrity:** A Looker dashboard issue, likely caused by recent GA4/Amplitude changes, is blocking data. This must be resolved to establish a single source of truth for reporting.](https://fathom.video/share/xPjBmpzye8CgLBto_Yg-zu4GVZ4BxnLk?tab=summary&timestamp=1151.0)
  - [**Content Authority:** A commissioned IDC report (launching Dec 8) will be used to add authority to new and refreshed content, reinforcing Outreach's leadership position.](https://fathom.video/share/xPjBmpzye8CgLBto_Yg-zu4GVZ4BxnLk?tab=summary&timestamp=638.0)

## Topics

### Strategic Repositioning & Content Roadmap

  - [**Goal:** Shift brand perception from an SDR-only tool to a full RevOps platform.](https://fathom.video/share/xPjBmpzye8CgLBto_Yg-zu4GVZ4BxnLk?tab=summary&timestamp=252.0)
  - [**Strategy:**](https://fathom.video/share/xPjBmpzye8CgLBto_Yg-zu4GVZ4BxnLk?tab=summary&timestamp=483.0)
      - [**New Clusters:** Create dedicated content clusters for Forecasting and Conversation Intelligence to build deep topical authority.](https://fathom.video/share/xPjBmpzye8CgLBto_Yg-zu4GVZ4BxnLk?tab=summary&timestamp=483.0)
      - [**SDR Content:** Optimize existing SDR/BDR content (a key revenue driver) by adding a broader platform angle, rather than removing it entirely.](https://fathom.video/share/xPjBmpzye8CgLBto_Yg-zu4GVZ4BxnLk?tab=summary&timestamp=841.0)
      - [**Tool Comparisons:** Implement a two-stage approval process to vet tool lists with PMMs before drafting, preventing delays.](https://fathom.video/share/xPjBmpzye8CgLBto_Yg-zu4GVZ4BxnLk?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [**Key Asset:** A commissioned IDC report on scaling AI and revenue intelligence launches Dec 8. Its data and quotes will be integrated into new and refreshed content to add authority.](https://fathom.video/share/xPjBmpzye8CgLBto_Yg-zu4GVZ4BxnLk?tab=summary&timestamp=638.0)

### November Performance & Analytics

  - [**Traffic & Engagement:**](https://fathom.video/share/xPjBmpzye8CgLBto_Yg-zu4GVZ4BxnLk?tab=summary&timestamp=1375.0)
      - [**Sessions:** Dipped seasonally vs. a strong October, but remained higher than September.](https://fathom.video/share/xPjBmpzye8CgLBto_Yg-zu4GVZ4BxnLk?tab=summary&timestamp=1598.0)
      - [**Engagement:** Rates were very high (60–80%), confirming content quality and success in driving users to other pages.](https://fathom.video/share/xPjBmpzye8CgLBto_Yg-zu4GVZ4BxnLk?tab=summary&timestamp=1508.0)
  - [**Search Console Data:**](https://fathom.video/share/xPjBmpzye8CgLBto_Yg-zu4GVZ4BxnLk?tab=summary&timestamp=1654.0)
      - [**Position 1 Queries:** Grew 2% to over 1,400.](https://fathom.video/share/xPjBmpzye8CgLBto_Yg-zu4GVZ4BxnLk?tab=summary&timestamp=1654.0)
      - [**Positions 2–10 Queries:** Declined 11% to over 6,000, indicating a shift of queries into Position 1.](https://fathom.video/share/xPjBmpzye8CgLBto_Yg-zu4GVZ4BxnLk?tab=summary&timestamp=1654.0)
  - [**LLM Visibility (Scrunch):**](https://fathom.video/share/xPjBmpzye8CgLBto_Yg-zu4GVZ4BxnLk?tab=summary&timestamp=1768.0)
      - [**Traffic:** November was the highest-performing month for LLM-driven visits this year.](https://fathom.video/share/xPjBmpzye8CgLBto_Yg-zu4GVZ4BxnLk?tab=summary&timestamp=1768.0)
      - [**Drivers:** ChatGPT remains dominant, but Gemini and Perplexity are growing sources.](https://fathom.video/share/xPjBmpzye8CgLBto_Yg-zu4GVZ4BxnLk?tab=summary&timestamp=1805.0)
      - [**Sentiment:** 100% positive, up from 99% in October.](https://fathom.video/share/xPjBmpzye8CgLBto_Yg-zu4GVZ4BxnLk?tab=summary&timestamp=2257.0)
      - [**Opportunity:** Increase presence for CRM-related prompts, a strategic focus for Outreach.](https://fathom.video/share/xPjBmpzye8CgLBto_Yg-zu4GVZ4BxnLk?tab=summary&timestamp=2370.0)

### Technical & Reporting Updates

  - [**Looker Dashboard Issue:** A tab is broken, blocking data.](https://fathom.video/share/xPjBmpzye8CgLBto_Yg-zu4GVZ4BxnLk?tab=summary&timestamp=1151.0)
      - [**Cause:** Likely related to recent GA4/Amplitude tracking changes.](https://fathom.video/share/xPjBmpzye8CgLBto_Yg-zu4GVZ4BxnLk?tab=summary&timestamp=1278.0)
      - [**Impact:** Prevents accurate reporting and establishes a single source of truth.](https://fathom.video/share/xPjBmpzye8CgLBto_Yg-zu4GVZ4BxnLk?tab=summary&timestamp=1303.0)
  - [**Reporting Metric Change:** The dashboard will switch from tracking "Views" to "Engaged Sessions."](https://fathom.video/share/xPjBmpzye8CgLBto_Yg-zu4GVZ4BxnLk?tab=summary&timestamp=1394.0)
      - [**Rationale:** "Engaged Sessions" is a more valuable metric, measuring active interaction (10+ seconds, 2+ page views, or a click/scroll) over simple page refreshes.](https://fathom.video/share/xPjBmpzye8CgLBto_Yg-zu4GVZ4BxnLk?tab=summary&timestamp=1394.0)
  - [**Webflow Migration:** The site migration from Craft to Webflow is underway, with Jasper assisting. This is the current priority, so landing page revamps are on hold.](https://fathom.video/share/xPjBmpzye8CgLBto_Yg-zu4GVZ4BxnLk?tab=summary&timestamp=1085.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Hadassah:**](https://fathom.video/share/xPjBmpzye8CgLBto_Yg-zu4GVZ4BxnLk?tab=summary&timestamp=1151.0)
      - [Investigate the Looker dashboard issue with Andrew (web dev).](https://fathom.video/share/xPjBmpzye8CgLBto_Yg-zu4GVZ4BxnLk?tab=summary&timestamp=1151.0)
      - [Share the final IDC report (post-Dec 8 launch) with GrowthX.](https://fathom.video/share/xPjBmpzye8CgLBto_Yg-zu4GVZ4BxnLk?tab=summary&timestamp=638.0)
      - [Confirm if increasing CRM-related LLM visibility is a priority.](https://fathom.video/share/xPjBmpzye8CgLBto_Yg-zu4GVZ4BxnLk?tab=summary&timestamp=2370.0)
  - [**Jo:**](https://fathom.video/share/xPjBmpzye8CgLBto_Yg-zu4GVZ4BxnLk?tab=summary&timestamp=1375.0)
      - [Update the Looker dashboard to track "Engaged Sessions" instead of "Views."](https://fathom.video/share/xPjBmpzye8CgLBto_Yg-zu4GVZ4BxnLk?tab=summary&timestamp=1394.0)
      - [Share the full November performance report with the Outreach team.](https://fathom.video/share/xPjBmpzye8CgLBto_Yg-zu4GVZ4BxnLk?tab=summary&timestamp=2557.0)
      - [Begin research to define new content clusters for Forecasting and Conversation Intelligence.](https://fathom.video/share/xPjBmpzye8CgLBto_Yg-zu4GVZ4BxnLk?tab=summary&timestamp=483.0)
